channel.title: Sunset Bali on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in Sunset Bali on Bali Kini

item.title: 5 Spot Sunset Terbaik di Bali 2026: Dari Tebing Ikonik hingga Pantai Tersembunyi
item.description:
Tidak ada yang menandingi keindahan senja di Bali. Langit berubah jingga keemasan, ombak menyapa pantai, dan udara terasa lebih hangat — inilah momen yang dicari jutaan wisatawan setiap tahunnya. Jika kamu berada di Bali sore ini, jangan lewatkan 5 spot sunset terbaik ini.

1. Tanah Lot — Sunset Paling Ikonik di Bali

Tanah Lot bukan sekadar pura di atas batu karang; ia adalah simbol Bali itu sendiri. Saat matahari mulai turun di ufuk barat, siluet pura yang berdiri gagah di tengah laut menciptakan pemandangan yang tak terlupakan. Datanglah sekitar pukul 17.00 WITA agar kamu bisa memilih posisi foto terbaik sebelum kerumunan memenuhi tepian.

item.title: 7 Best Sunset Spots in Bali You Must Visit in 2026
item.description:
Bali’s late afternoons possess a particular kind of magic. As the sun tilts westward, the sky transforms into a vast canvas of orange, pink and violet — a spectacle photographed a million times, yet never losing its power. If you’re in Bali and wondering where to spend your evening, here are the seven sunset spots that consistently deliver.

1. Tanah Lot — The Temple on the Sea

Nothing rivals Tanah Lot at golden hour. The ancient sea temple, perched on an isolated rock formation separated from the mainland at high tide, becomes a perfect silhouette as the sun drops behind it. The combination of crashing Indian Ocean waves, flickering temple offerings, and a sky ablaze with colour makes this one of the most photographed scenes in all of Asia.
